chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 1478 of 2022 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Priority case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.5800/2022 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 21.09.2023 Mr. Shewak Ram Valecha, Advocate along with Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Nawaz Qazi, Advocate for Respondent No.4 Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press this petition. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
